mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, auto_exec_job_id, exec_order, exec_sql, status, affect_row, sql_type, biz_id, exec_count, gmt_last_start, gmt_last_end
mapper.update: update dm_exec_auto_task set status = 'FINISH' where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status = 'WAIT_CONFIRM'
update dm_exec_auto_task set status = 'ROLLBACK' where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status in ('WAIT_CONFIRM','EXECUTING')
update dm_exec_auto_task set status = 'WAIT_EXEC' where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status in ('FAILED','ROLLBACK','WAIT_CONFIRM','EXECUTING')
mapper.delete: update dm_exec_auto_task set status = 'CANCELED' where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status in ('WAIT_EXEC','EXECUTING')
mapper.select:
select
from dm_exec_auto_task where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status in ('WAIT_EXEC','FAILED','ROLLBACK')
select count(1) from dm_exec_auto_task where auto_exec_job_id = #{jobId} and status in ('WAIT_EXEC','FAILED','ROLLBACK')
